content: {"businessRules": ["Matching Engine 7-pass strategy: AUTO_COMPLETE (1.0), HARD_REF (0.95), EXACT_SUM (1.0), PRICE_FLEX (0.85), WILDCARDS (0.80), TOLERANCE (0.70), CASH_FILL (0.50).", "Implements stock limit checks and allows/disallows negative stock based on configuration.", "Automatic decomposition in createLine when physical stock is insufficient.", "Commission extraction from bank observations using regex 'Comi(?:s(?:i[\u00f3o]n)?)?:?\\s*([0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]{1,2})?)'.", "Real-time stock calculation: initial_stock + entries - exits - sales.", "Non-negative stock requirement for 'A Medida' products (m, m2, m3, kg, lb).", "Greedy unit decomposition algorithm for BOX, PACK, and UNIT levels.", "Demand rounding to the nearest multiple of 10.", "Inventory reconstruction modes: Mode A (Only Sales), Mode B (Sales + Existing Receipts), Mode C (Stock Goal).", "Automatic generation of corrective receipts for negative stock points."], "business_goal": "Asegurar que cada peso
